No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Per the agreement of parties, DEFENDANTS PRESIDENTIAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY, ATHENE ANNUITY & LIFE ASSURANCE COMPANY, AND ATHENE ANNUITY & LIFE ASSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is continued to July 17th, 2015. The matter is continued to July 17th, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 318 to be heard by Judge Joseph M. Quinn. The tentative ruling in this matter issued by Judge Quinn on 6/26/15 in advance of the 6/29/15 hearing date shall stand and be carried over as the Court's tentative ruling for the new 7/17/15 hearing date. The Court will not be re-posting the tentative ruling in advance of the 7/17/15 hearing date. Judge Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/JMQ)
